nasb.text: Now it happened that while the crowd was pressing around Him and listening to the word of God, He was standing by the lake of Gennesaret;

esv.text: On one occasion, while the crowd was pressing in on him to hear the word of God, he was standing by the lake of Gennesaret,

cnv.text: 耶穌站在革尼撒勒湖邊，眾人擁擠他，要聽　神的道。

ccb.text: 一天，耶稣站在革尼撒勒湖边，众人团团围着祂，要听上帝的道。

csbs.text: 有一次，当人群拥挤着耶稣，听神的话语的时候，他正站在革尼撒勒湖边。
